info.name: Ishraf Platform Backend API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the ready backend modules. Default variables now target the hosted Render staging backend, and login stores collection access and refresh tokens automatically.

request.description: Readiness endpoint that checks database connectivity.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. Login and refresh requests automatically save collection access and refresh tokens.

request.description: Logs in against the hosted staging backend by default. Fill loginIdentifier and loginPassword in the selected Postman environment or collection variables.
Requests a password reset token. The response remains generic; resetToken appears only when AUTH_EXPOSE_RESET_TOKEN_IN_RESPONSE is enabled.
Resets the password using a token produced by Forgot Password.
Rotates the current refresh token and updates the stored accessToken and refreshToken variables.
Revokes the current refresh token. This endpoint does not require Authorization header.
Changes the password for the authenticated user and revokes all refresh tokens for that user.
Creates a teacher user. The API returns users.id, not teachers.id.

Admin-only paginated users list.

Supported query params:
- page
- limit
- sortBy: createdAt | fullName | email | role
- sortOrder: asc | desc
- role
- isActive

Response shape:
data.items + data.pagination
Send only profile fields that match the user's current role.

item.name: Academic Structure
item.description: Admin-only academic years, semesters, grade levels, classes, subjects, and assignment endpoints.

request.description: teacherId must be teachers.id, not users.id. The current Users API does not expose teachers.id.
supervisorId must be supervisors.id, not users.id. The current Users API does not expose supervisors.id.

item.name: Homework
item.description: Wave 1 homework endpoints for admin, teacher, and parent-owned student access.

request.description: For parent accounts this is parent-owned and restricted to linked children.

item.name: Reporting Wave 1
item.description: Parent-owned child reporting, supervisor dashboard, and parent transport live status.
